body:
## Rationale

**Lamb of God 'Sacrament' (2006)** is LoG's Epic Records debut — Grammy-nominated for Best Metal Performance ('Redneck'), debuted at #8 on Billboard 200, and cemented Chris Adler as one of metal's premier groove/thrash drummers. We already have `ashes-of-the-wake-drum-setup` (2004) for Chris Adler, but **Sacrament (2006) is a distinct recording era** — upgraded touring rig, different snare tuning, more studio polish. Chris Adler IS on roster.

**GSC signal:** 'chris adler drum setup' has growing impression volume; 'lamb of god sacrament drums' is a TAM expansion into mainstream heavy metal audiences.

## File to create

`packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — slug `sacrament-drum-setup`

## Template shape

```js
'sacrament-drum-setup': {
  slug: 'sacrament-drum-setup',
  title: "Lamb of God 'Sacrament' Drum Setup — Chris Adler's 2006 Grammy-Era Kit",
  description: "Explore Chris Adler's drum setup on Lamb of God's Grammy-nominated Sacrament (2006) — DW kit, Zildjian cymbals, groove metal technique.",
  drummer: 'chris-adler',
  drummerName: 'Chris Adler',
  band: 'Lamb of God',
  album: 'Sacrament',
  year: 2006,
  genre: 'Groove Metal / New Wave of American Heavy Metal',
  relatedAlbums: ['ashes-of-the-wake-drum-setup', 'whats-in-chris-adlers-kit'],
  datePublished: '2026-06-20',
  dateModified: '2026-06-20'
}
```

Content must cover:
- DW Collector's kit (Chris's main endorsement era) — specific dimensions
- Zildjian A Custom cymbals setup
- Groove metal technique: the syncopated right-hand/kick interplay that defines LoG
- Recording context: Machine (Colin Richardson), Capitol Studios
- Gear diff vs Ashes of the Wake (2004 era)
- FAQ: 'what kit does chris adler use', 'lamb of god sacrament recording drums', 'chris adler dw kit specs'
- Internal links: /drummer/chris-adler, /articles/ashes-of-the-wake-drum-setup

## Quality gate
- ≥350 words
- ≥3 FAQ entries
- ≥3 internal links
- Article + BreadcrumbList + MusicAlbum schemas
- LLM companion: `public/llms/articles/sacrament-drum-setup.md`

## Estimated organic uplift
'Sacrament' + 'Chris Adler' = NWOAHM + mainstream metal TAM. Grammy nomination makes this a high-authority editorial anchor. Complements the existing Ashes of the Wake article.

## Verify
1. `/articles/sacrament-drum-setup` returns 200
2. JSON-LD has Article + MusicAlbum + FAQPage
3. relatedAlbums links resolve (ashes-of-the-wake slug exists)
4. LLM file at `/llms/articles/sacrament-drum-setup.md` returns 200
5. Sitemap entry at priority 0.9

## Done
Slug `sacrament-drum-setup` live in albumArticles.js, page rendering, LLM file created.
title: SEO: Lamb of God 'Sacrament' drum setup article — Grammy-nominated mainstream breakthrough (Chris Adler, 2006)
